description: Letter addressed to Abū l-Makārim Ibn al-Amshāṭī, in Fustat, in Qaysāriyyat al-ʿAṭṭārīn. In Judaeo-Arabic. The sender purchased עוד רטב from the addressee and took it to Alexandria and was unable to [...]. (The continuation is missing.) (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
